path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 29 - Bayonetta (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2016)\01. Theme of Bayonetta - Mysterious Destiny (Instrumental).mp3
description: Bayonetta music is unlike anything else. It's maximalist and cunty and dramatic and jazzy, but for some of the tracks it becomes cheesy because they have vocals. This normally has singing, but I was delighted by this much better version with just a saxophone instead. It sounds classier.
title: Theme of Bayonetta - Mysterious Destiny (Instrumental)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 29: Bayonetta

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 29 - Bayonetta (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2016)\02. One of a Kind.mp3
description: Some of the Bayonetta music is also very epic and dramatic and this is one of those. Can you believe that this plays during the first battle in the game. This one keeps going up in key changes
title: One of a Kind
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 29: Bayonetta

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 29 - Bayonetta (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2016)\03. Riders of the Light.mp3
description: This is so fabulous and sassy, I love it. When you listen to this, you instantly picture Bayonetta strutting around. How did they make a soundtrack this unique.
title: Riders of the Light
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 29: Bayonetta

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 29 - Bayonetta (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2016)\04. Let's Hit the Climax!.mp3
description: I loooove this track. It's so dramatic. The music leaves room for poses, I swear, it's MADE for Bayonetta. That melody with all the jazzy grace notes sounds like someone's hand swishing.
title: Let's Hit the Climax!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 29: Bayonetta

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 29 - Bayonetta (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2016)\05. Red & Black.mp3
description: Music from when you fight Jeanne! Darker than your ordinary Bayonetta slay music. The piano is so good.
title: Red & Black
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 29: Bayonetta

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 29 - Bayonetta (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2016)\06. After Burner (∞ Climax Mix).mp3
description: This track goes so hard! It's a remix of an old Sega Mega Drive game called After Burner, not really sure why it's in a Bayonetta game, but they Bayonetta-fied the track and now it's fabulous. It also has an insane 5-minute loop.
title: After Burner (∞ Climax Mix)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 29: Bayonetta

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 29 - Bayonetta (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2016)\07. Friendship.mp3
description: This music is the part where Bayonetta goes to space to save Jeanne. It's epic and sounds great.
title: Friendship
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 29: Bayonetta

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 29 - Bayonetta (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2016)\08. Let's Dance, Boys!.mp3
description: Maybe the most iconic music from Bayonetta and for good reason, it's a huge bop. It's sexy, flamboyant and saxolicious. In the game it plays during the credits when Bayonetta rewards the player with an insane 3 minute choreography. I love it.
title: Let's Dance, Boys!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 29: Bayonetta

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 29 - Bayonetta (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2016)\09. Tomorrow is Mine (Bayonetta 2 Theme) (Instrumental).mp3
description: This is the battle music from Bayonetta 2, a game I've actually played. I love the music from this game but I struggled with the cheesy vocals on this music which you hear constantly, so I was happy to hear it with a classy saxophone instead. Good stuff.
title: Tomorrow is Mine (Bayonetta 2 Theme) (Instrumental)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 29: Bayonetta

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 29 - Bayonetta (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2016)\10. The Legend of Aesir.mp3
description: This overly epic music doesn't do it for me at all. Very forgettable.
title: The Legend of Aesir
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 29: Bayonetta

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 29 - Bayonetta (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2016)\11. Time for the Climax!.mp3
description: I love this modified version of the climax theme. It sounds more melancholic than the first one while still remaining as dramatic. It's great.
title: Time for the Climax!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 29: Bayonetta
